name: cotidie
description: Cotidie's custom Codex skills: PR writing, iteration roadmaps, coding guidelines, UML class diagrams, CLI user testing, slide design extraction, React scaffolding and humanizing AI-sounding text.

interface.shortDescription: Custom Codex workflows for PR writing, iteration roadmaps, coding guidelines, UML class diagrams, CLI user testing, slide design extraction, React scaffolding and humanizing text.
interface.longDescription: Cotidie's Codex plugin bundles reusable workflow skills for drafting pull request text, planning vertical user-testable iterations, keeping coding work simple and verifiable, creating or modifying UML class diagrams as draw.io files, driving built programs through the terminal as a real user to surface bugs, reverse-engineering reference slides into a reusable DESIGN.md visual design system, scaffolding or refactoring React apps and rewriting AI-sounding prose into more natural text.
capabilities: Draft PR and MR titles and bodies
Keep coding changes simple, surgical and verifiable
Create UML class diagrams as draw.io files
Modify existing UML class diagrams against code
Drive built programs as a real user and report findings
Reverse-engineer reference slides into a reusable DESIGN.md design system
Scaffold or refactor React apps with bundled conventions
Rewrite AI-sounding text into more natural prose
